gloss_en: Hello, how are you? I hope you are well.
notes: kīfak (cowell1964); b-imperfect بِتْمَنَّى; initial cluster tk- (Levantine syncope, almbark2015)

sentence: اَلزَّيت وَالزَّعْتَر عَ الطَّاوْلِة يَا سِتِّي.
raw: الزيت والزعتر ع الطاولة يا ستي.
ipa: azzeːt wazzaʕtar ʕa tˤtˤɑːwle jaː sittiː
gloss_en: The oil and the za'atar are on the table, grandma.
notes: zēt u zaʕtar (Palestinian staple collocation); sun assimilation az-z; sittī 'grandma' geminate تّ

sentence: مَا بِدِّيش أَرُوح عَالْمَدْرَسِة بُكْرَا الصُّبِح.
raw: ما بديش أروح عالمدرسة بكرا الصبح.
ipa: maː biddiːʃ ʔaruːħ ʕaːlmadrase bukraː sˤsˤubiħ
gloss_en: I don't want to go to school tomorrow morning.
notes: circumfix negation mā...š (cotter2016: Gazan/rural -š); imala madrase (fadda2016)

sentence: قَدَّيش صَارُوا التَّلَامِيذ فِي صَفّ الْقُدْس؟
raw: قديش صاروا التلاميذ في صف القدس؟
ipa: ʔaddeːʃ sˤɑːruː ttalaːmiːd fiː sˤɑff alʔuds
gloss_en: How many pupils are there now in the Jerusalem class?
notes: ʔaddēš; ق=/ʔ/ urban (cotter2016 on Gaza City /ʔ/); ذ→/d/ in talāmīd (urban stop reflex)

sentence: جِدِّي زَرَع ظَهْر الْجَبَل زَيْتُون وتِين.
raw: جدي زرع ظهر الجبل زيتون وتين.
ipa: ʒiddiː zaraʕ dˤɑhr alʒabal zeːtuːn wtiːn
gloss_en: My grandfather planted the hillside with olives and figs.
notes: ج=/ʒ/ urban Palestinian (almbark2015); ظ urban reflex; diphthong ay in زَيْتُون
